title: AI's Model Context Protocols: The Future Revealed! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof explores Model Context Protocols (MCPs) as an emerging approach in AI, examining their current applications and speculating on future developments in the field.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof introduces Model Context Protocols (MCPs) as an emerging approach in AI. It covers current applications of MCPs and speculates on where the field may head. The value lies in framing MCPs as a developing standard worth tracking, though the format keeps the treatment brief and high level.
